arabic:
وعن أبى هريرة رضى الله عنه قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏ما عاب رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم طعاماً قط، إن اشتهاه أكله، وإن كرهه تركه‏"‏ ‏.‏ ((متفق عليه))

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text:
Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) never found fault with food. If he had inclination to eating it, he would eat; and if he disliked it, he would leave it.

.

chapter.english: The Book About the Etiquette of Eating
